triggers.name: Enemy timer: Allure
triggers.comments: ~20m30s at level 50 (formula 10, cap 205 ticks); DoT/debuff; the engine rescales to the profile's level; Enchanter level 46. v1 keys enemy timers by spell name only — two mobs under the same spell share one bar.

triggers.name: Enemy timer cleared: Allure
triggers.pattern: ^Your Allure spell has worn off(?: of (.+))?\.$
triggers.comments: Cancels the cast-start countdown early (mez break, mob death) and re-announces on the overlay. Overlay text only — curated packs own the spoken wear-offs.

triggers.pattern: ^Your Wind of Tashanian spell has worn off(?: of (.+))?\.$
